contestDescription: A 48-hour hackathon focused on building innovative dApps and tools for the Cardano ecosystem. Participants will compete for prizes while showcasing their development skills and creativity. This event brings together developers, designers, and blockchain enthusiasts to create solutions that advance the Cardano ecosystem.
submissionRequirements: Projects must be built during the hackathon period, use Cardano blockchain technology, and include a working demo. Source code must be open source and submitted to GitHub. All team members must be registered participants.
contestRules: All participants must register before the start date. Teams can have up to 4 members. Projects must be original work created during the hackathon. No use of pre-existing codebases beyond standard libraries. All submissions must include a working demo and documentation.
eligibilityRequirements: Open to developers worldwide. Participants must be 18+ years old. Previous hackathon experience is welcome but not required. Basic knowledge of blockchain development recommended.
